name: Barthemas Park
description: Barthemas Park is a place to play pickleball in Circleville, OH. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Pickaway County YMCA
description: Pickaway County YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Circleville, OH. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Silversneakers - 65+ (check to see if provided by Insurance), YMCA Membership Required
